Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start
RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWORDEMPRODUCAOITEM', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv)
loadWWPContext.Call(&Context)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
UnnamedTable4.Width = 150 UnnamedTable3.Width = 150 UnnamedTable2.Width = 150
Grid.Rows = Page.Rows &ProTipDef = Definicao.FABRICADO &ProSts = nullvalue(&ProSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Ordem Producao'
Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' &OrderedBy.Clear() &OrderedBy.AddItem(1, 'Código Produto') &OrderedBy.AddItem(2, 'Descrição Produto') &OrderedBy.AddItem(3, 'Ordem Prioridade') &OrderedBy.AddItem(4, 'Exedente Producao') &OrderedBy.AddItem(5, 'Maior Qtd. Produção') &OrderedBy.AddItem(6, 'Menor Qtd. Estoque') &OrderedBy.AddItem(7, 'Menor Dias Estoque') &OrderedBy.AddItem(8, 'Sugestão Produção') &OrderedBy.AddItem(9, 'ABC.R') &OrderedBy.AddItem(10, 'ABC.Q') If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &OrderedDsc.Visible = False &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
&auxGrupHie = &GrupHie.Trim()+'.' &AuxEmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FilCod = &Context.FilCod
EndEvent
Event Refresh
&EstFab.Enabled = 1 &SalvaLinha.Enabled = 1 &auxGrupHie = &GrupHie.Trim()+'.'
do 'TotalFabricar'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context)
Do 'SaveGridState'
&GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
&AuxEmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FilCod = &Context.FilCod // // msg('Dados Atualizado Com Sucesso!')
EndEvent
Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event Grid.Load
&ProVlrCus = ProVlrCus &EstFab = EstFab &EstDias = EstDias
if EstSdo < 0 EstSdo_Formatado.ForeColor = RGB(220,0,0) Else EstSdo_Formatado.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) EndIF
EstQtd_Formatado.Link = wpConsultaEstoque.Link(ProCod)
UltimaDataQuantidadeProducao.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, 0, serverdate(), ProCod, ProGraCod, &UltEstQtd, &EstUltOrd, &AuxGrupHie, &ProSetCod)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&ProximoItem.FromImage(ActionCancel) &ProximoItem.TooltipText = ""
&gridProRef = ProRef &gridProNom = ProNom &gridEstPrd_Formatado = EstPrd_Formatado &gridEstCom_Formatado = EstCom_Formatado &gridEstQtd_Formatado = EstQtd_Formatado &gridEstVen_Formatado = EstVen_Formatado &gridEstSdo_Formatado = EstSdo_Formatado &gridEstMinDia = EstMinDia &gridEstMin_Formatado = EstMin_Formatado &gridEstSug_Formatado = EstSug_Formatado
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
ProNom.Link = VerProduto.Link('DashBoard', EmpCod, ProCod) ProNom.LinkTarget = '_blank'
EstSug_Formatado.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) EstFabMin_Formatado.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0)
if EstSug_FORMULA > 0 If EstSug_FORMULA > EstFabMin EstSug_Formatado.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,220) Else EstFabMin_Formatado.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,220) EndIF EndIF
EndEvent
Event &OrderedBy.Click
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Refresh
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoGerarOrdemProducao'
CarregaSdtProducaoItem.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &ProSetCod, &ProTipDef, &GrupHie, &OrderedBy, TipoOrdem.OrdemProducao, &sdtOrdemProducao)
&DataHoje = serverDate() &DataHora = serverTime() GravaOrdemProducaoItens.Call('', &Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &GrupHie, &ProSetCod, &sdtOrdemProducao, TipoOrdem.OrdemProducao, &DataHoje, &DataHora, &DataHoje, &DataHora, &OrdCod)
wpQuantidadesAProduzir.Link('WWORDEMPRODUCAOITENS', &Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &OrdCod)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoExport'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
// Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportWWOrdemProducaoItens.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoExportReport'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
// Generate PDF file. Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = ExportReportWWOrdemProducaoItens.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC')
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'LoadGridState'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
// Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif
&OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus'
For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROSETCOD" &ProSetCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"AUXGRUPHIE" &AuxGrupHie.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROREF" &ProRef.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROCODNOM" &ProCodNom.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROTIPDEF" &ProTipDef.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"GRUPHIE" &GrupHie.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILCOD" &FilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROGRACOD" &ProGraCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROSTS" &ProSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'SaveGridState'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState"))
// Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROSETCOD", "", not &ProSetCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProSetCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"AUXGRUPHIE", "", not &AuxGrupHie.IsEmpty(), 0, &AuxGrupHie, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROREF", "", not &ProRef.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProRef, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROCODNOM", "", not &ProCodNom.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProCodNom, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROTIPDEF", "", true, 0, &ProTipDef, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"GRUPHIE", "", not &GrupHie.IsEmpty(), 0, &GrupHie, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILCOD", "", not &FilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROGRACOD", "", not &ProGraCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProGraCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROSTS", "", not &ProSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProSts, '')
&GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml())
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'PrepareTransaction'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"OrdemProducao"
&Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml())
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Event 'DoCalculoMinimo'
wpEstoqueMinimo.Popup() refresh
EndEvent
Event 'DoExedente'
wpExcedenteProducao.Popup(&ProSetCod, &GrupHie, &ProTipDef, 0) Refresh
EndEvent
Event &EstFab.IsValid
GravarFabricar.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, ProCod, ProGraCod, &EstFab, &EstDias) do 'TotalFabricar'
EndEvent
Event &ProximoItem.Click
GravarFabricar.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, ProCod, ProGraCod, &EstFab, &EstDias) do 'TotalFabricar'
EndEvent
Sub 'TotalFabricar'
RetornaQtdFabricarSugestao.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &ProSetCod, &ProTipDef, &GrupHie, &QtdTotFabricar, &QtdTotSugestao, &QtdTotProducao)
EndSub
//Event &OrderedBy.Click // //// Refresh // //EndEvent

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
